practice.name: Problem 20 (2018 AMC 10B)
practice.statement: A function $f$ is defined recursively by $f(1) = f(2) = 1$ and $f(n) = f(n-1) - f(n-2) + n$ for all integers $n \geq 3$. What is $f(2018)$?

practice.name: Problem 18 (2006 AMC 12A)
practice.statement: The function $f$ has the property that for each real number $x$ in its domain, $\frac{1}{x}$ is also in its domain and $f(x) + f\left(\frac{1}{x}\right) = x$. What is the largest set of real numbers that can be in the domain of $f$?

practice.name: Problem 14 (2007 AIME II)
practice.statement: Let $f$ be a non-constant polynomial with real coefficients such that $f(x) \cdot f(-x) = f(x^2)$ for all real $x$, and $f\!\left(\tfrac{1}{2}\right) = \tfrac{1}{4}$. Find $f\!\left(\tfrac{1}{4}\right)$.
